name: structural-rubble-solidity
description: Verify falling and settled structural blocks remain solid player-collidable obstacles without a runtime error.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local PS=game:GetService("PhysicsService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local falling,playerCollision=0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root["Depth Blocks"]:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute("StructuralDetached") then falling+=1 if b:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling") and b.CanCollide and b.CollisionGroup=="FallingStructural" and PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,b.CollisionGroup) then playerCollision+=1 end end end local chunks=root["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren() local chunkGroup=chunks[1] and chunks[1].CollisionGroup or "none" local chunkCollision=chunks[1] and PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,chunks[1].CollisionGroup) or false return H:JSONEncode({falling=falling,playerCollision=playerCollision,characterGroup=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,chunkGroup=chunkGroup,chunkCollision=chunkCollision})

steps.label: falling structural blocks preserve player position
wait for structural blocks to settle

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local PS=game:GetService("PhysicsService") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local settled,solid,playerCollision=0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root["Depth Blocks"]:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute("StructuralDetached") then settled+=1 if not b:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling") and b.CanCollide and b.CollisionGroup=="Default" then solid+=1 end if PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,b.CollisionGroup) then playerCollision+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({settled=settled,solid=solid,playerCollision=playerCollision})

steps.label: settled structural blocks become solid obstacles
